claims.statement: matches decodes saltBase64 using Base64.getDecoder().decode before deriving the actual hash.
claims.source_quote: byte[] actualHash = derive(password, Base64.getDecoder().decode(saltBase64), iterations, KEY_LENGTH_BITS);

claims.statement: matches compares expectedHash and actualHash using MessageDigest.isEqual.

entities.name: matches
entities.description: Method that verifies whether a password matches an expected hash.

entities.name: decode
entities.description: Method call used to decode Base64 text.

entities.name: derive
entities.description: Method that derives key bytes from a password and salt.

entities.name: getDecoder
entities.description: Method call used to obtain a Base64 decoder.

entities.name: isEqual
entities.description: Method call used for constant-time byte array comparison.

relations.description: matches calls getDecoder to obtain a Base64 decoder.
matches calls decode to decode Base64 inputs.
matches calls derive to compute the actual hash.
matches calls isEqual to compare hashes.
